tasks.step: Create CLI entry point and wrapper scripts
tasks.notes: Created src/cli.ts with argument parsing skeleton, tool (Unix wrapper), and tool.cmd (Windows wrapper). LF line endings enforced via .gitattributes.
Reads version from package.json, prints 'fleet-e2e-toy vX.X.X', exits 0. Handles both --version and -v.
Handles help subcommand, --help, and -h flags. Prints usage text with all commands and flags. Exits 0.

tasks.step: Add input validation for empty/blank string arguments
tasks.notes: Added validateCliArg to validation.ts. Implemented 'add <title>' subcommand with validation. Rejects empty/whitespace strings, exits non-zero on error.
Created tests/cli.test.ts with end-to-end tests using spawnSync. Tests cover --version, -v, help, --help, -h, and add validation.
All tests passing (29/29). CLI features implemented: --version/-v, help/--help/-h, input validation for 'add' command.
